articles.title: “I did everything I could” – Fonseca admits hope after he put Milan ‘before everyone’
articles.summary: There can be several parallels drawn between Ruben Amorim and Paulo Fonseca and for some, that is a reason to worry. Like Fonseca, Amorim arrives after the appointment of other coaches seemed to be done and takes the reins from an Italian legend of the club who disappointed in their previous season.
